rag_rules: AGREE contracts for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings like assignments should be placed in implementation annexes after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Guarantees in component type annexes should relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Use valid variables or outputs when referencing subcomponent ports in type-level contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
